tagline: The Python notebook interactive debugger now supports multi file debugging.
what_it_does: The Python notebook interactive debugger now supports multi file debugging. You can set breakpoints and step into functions across multiple workspace files. The debugger automatically opens the file in a new tab when you step into it.
why_it_matters: This improvement makes it easier to debug code that spans multiple files in your workspace.
plain_summary: The Python notebook interactive debugger now supports multi file debugging. You can set breakpoints and step into functions across multiple workspace files.
key_takeaway: The Python notebook interactive debugger now supports multi file debugging.
